physical_traits.fur_description: Dense, short-hair black fur with a white chest patch and white 'mittens' on all four paws
physical_traits.facial_features: Grizzled gray muzzle and eye area indicative of a distinguished age

eyes.special_effect: Extremely magnified pupils/irises via thick lenses, pulling the color to the edges of the frame

expression.mouth: Wide-open 'cat-food' grin with visible teeth and tongue hanging out sideways
expression.detail: Small, strategic drool bubble hanging from the lower lip
expression.gaze: Fixed upward, focused on an unseen treat

outfit_and_accessories.eyewear: Round, thin-framed gold wire spectacles (magnifying lenses)
outfit_and_accessories.neckwear: Generous white cotton napkin with a red border trim, draped over the chest
outfit_and_accessories.footwear: Vibrant red suede slippers with soft fleece trim

art_style.lighting: Soft subsurface scattering on fur and skin
branding: iON Aventurile lui Ionică logo (bottom right)
